result.stdout:
Description:
  Record, Play and Share your PowerShell Session.

Usage:
  PowerSession [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  rec <file>     Record and save a session
  play <file>    Play a recorded session
  auth           Auth with asciinema.org
  upload <file>  Upload a session to ascinema.org

result.stdout:
Description:
  Play a recorded session

Usage:
  PowerSession play <file> [options]

Arguments:
  <file>  The record session

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Record and save a session

Usage:
  PowerSession rec <file> [options]

Arguments:
  <file>  The filename to save the record

Options:
  -c, --command <command>  The command to record, defaults to $SHELL
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Upload a session to ascinema.org

Usage:
  PowerSession upload <file> [options]

Arguments:
  <file>  The file to be uploaded

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
